summary: Unit tests cover core artifact cleanup logic (MaxAgeDays, KeepLatestN, MaxTotalSizeMB) with 13 test cases and good fixtures, but critically fail to address explicit task requirements: (1) NO GitHub Actions integration tests despite 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' requirement, (2) NO workflow structure validation or actionlint tests, (3) Missing edge cases (empty arrays, zero/negative sizes, boundary conditions), (4) No act output capture/verification. Tests are well-organized with clear Describe blocks and helper functions, but incomplete relative to task scope—missing ~50% of required test coverage (CI/CD pipeline validation).
